VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Follow Us

The Arsenal of Visual Performance

Technology

Visual software, projection systems, media servers, LED technologies, and AI tools powering VJ culture worldwide. Each tool links directly to the artists using it.

Category:
MM
Projection Mapping
MadMapper

Advanced projection mapping and LED mapping software for creating spatial augmented reality experiences and architectural projections.

Dominant in large-scale architectural projection mapping — direct brand exposure at festival-scale events in 30+ countries.
Used by: Luna VisualsFlux Collective
NTH
Real-Time 3D
Notch

Real-time 3D motion graphics, VFX, and interactive content creation tool used at the world's largest live events and music performances.

The tool behind the world's most famous live spectacles — sponsors gain association with arena-scale production credibility.
Used by: Luna VisualsPixel Storm
RES
Visual Software
Resolume Arena

Industry-leading VJ software for real-time video mixing, compositing, and effects. Used by VJs worldwide for live performances and installations.

Highest usage across featured artists — logo placement on every artist profile, project card, and live broadcast overlay.
Used by: VJ KaiNova SpectrumPixel Storm
AI
AI & Generative
AI Visual Generation

AI-powered visual generation tools (Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, Deforum) enabling a new wave of generative VJ performances that create visuals from text and audio in real-time.

The hottest emerging category — brands sponsoring AI visual tools gain first-mover positioning in the fastest-growing sector of live visual art.
Used by: VJ KaiAurora Fractals
TD
Visual Software
TouchDesigner

A node-based visual programming environment for real-time interactive multimedia content. The industry standard for generative visual art and interactive installations.

Platform of choice for AI visual artists — featured in generative art projects reaching the most technically engaged audience.
Used by: VJ KaiNova SpectrumAurora Fractals
For Technology Brands

Get Your Technology Featured

Reach the most technically engaged VJ audience on the planet. Technology partner placement drives direct software adoption and brand credibility.
